ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Paying The Transfer Fee
Off Calendar Jun-18-2018 Continued To Jul-02-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Trustee and the Attorney to appear on July 2, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, why the transfer fee has not been paid and show cause as to why the Trustee should not be removed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Santiago. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Guardian and the Attorney to appear on June 18, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the transfer fee has not been paid. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
